title: troximon heterophyllum
intro: Troximon heterophyllum, also known as Western Yarrow or Milfoil, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin irritations, and fever, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Troximon heterophyllum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Troximon heterophyllum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be applied topically as a poultice or salve to aid in the healing process.
